name: Emergency Medical Cargo Drop
description: You are a drone logistics operator executing an emergency medical delivery. Tune the ArduCopter flight parameters (WPNAV_SPEED and WPNAV_ACCEL) and create a mission to drop cargo based on the requirements in the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/cargo_mission_brief.txt. The mission must include the specified drop coordinates, safe drop altitude, and servo release command. Save the mission to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/cargo_drop.plan.
